creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 237847
x11/py-python-xapp - patch for 2.2.2 update

The linuxmint python3-xapp is now available in a release 2.2.2

This patch corresponds to a combined patch set for x11/cinnamon
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267250
and a patch for x11/xapp https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267547
